title: tribulus suberosus
intro: Tribulus suberosus is a shrub-like plant species native to tropical Africa, belonging to the family Zygophyllaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Tribulus suberosus include its potential to support immune function, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties against certain pathogens. Tribulus suberosus can be prepared as a herbal tea or extract, and it has also been used as a component in various traditional remedies.
